rationale: Erdős 324 variant.quintic (a^5+b^5 distinct for a<b) is open in general; this submission targets the S1 bounded native_decide version for a,b ≤ 50. Python scan to N=1000 confirms zero collisions (500500 distinct sums). Lean theorem reduces to a finite decidable check. Unbounded statement remains open — this is a publishable bounded subclaim, not the full conjecture.
